modules.backend.table package#

Submodules#

modules.backend.table.flag module#

class FlagTableManager(series: Series, mainwindow)[source]#

Bases: object

close()[source]#

Close all tables.

deleteFlags(flags: list, match_name=False)[source]#

Delete an object or objects on every section.

Params:

flags (list): the list of flags to delete match_name (bool): True if flags with same name should be deleted

editFlag(old_flag: Flag, new_flag: Flag)[source]#

Edit a flag.

Params:

snum (int): the section number containing the flag flag (Flag): the flag to modify new_flag (Flag): the flag to replace

markResolved(flags: list, resolved: bool)[source]#

Edit the resolved status of a flag.

Params:

flags (list): the list of flags to modify resolved (bool): the resolve status to set for the flag

newTable()[source]#

Create a new object list widget.

refresh()[source]#

Reload all of the section data.

updateSection(section: Section)[source]#

Update the data and the table for a specific section.

Params:

section (Section): the section object section_num (int): the section number

updateTable(table: FlagTableWidget)[source]#

Updates a table with the current data.

Params:

table (ObjectTableWidget): the table to update

updateTables()[source]#

Update all tables.

modules.backend.table.object module#

class ObjectTableManager(series: Series, mainwindow)[source]#

Bases: object

close()[source]#

Close all tables.

createZtrace(obj_names: list, cross_sectioned: bool)[source]#

Create ztraces from a set of objects.

Params:

obj_names (list): the objects to create ztraces for croess_sectioned (bool): True if object is cross-sectioned

deleteObjects(obj_names: list)[source]#

Delete an object or objects on every section.

Params:

obj_names (list): the list of names for the objects to delete

edit3D(obj_names: list, new_type: str, new_opacity: float)[source]#

Modify the 3D settings for a set of objects.

Params:

obj_names (list): the objects to modify new_type (str): the 3D type for the objects new_opacity (float): the opacity for the 3D objects

editAttributes(obj_names: list, attr_trace: Trace, sections: list)[source]#

Edit objects on every section.

Params:

series (Series): the series object obj_names (list): the names of the objects to rename attr_trace (Trace): the trace holding the new attributes section (list): the sections to modify attributes for

editRadius(obj_names: list, new_rad: float)[source]#

Change the radii of all traces of an object.

Params:

obj_names (list): the names of objects to modify new_rad (float): the new radius for the traces of the object

editShape(obj_names: list, new_shape: list)[source]#

Change the shapes of all traces of an object.

Params:

obj_names (list): the names of objects to modify new_shape (list): the new shape for the traces of the object

findObject(obj_name: str, first=True)[source]#

Find an object in the series.

Params:

obj_name (str): the name of the object first (bool): whether to find first or last object in series

hideObjects(obj_names: list, hide=True)[source]#

Hide all traces of an object throughout the series.

Params:

obj_names (list): the names of objects to hide hide (bool): True if object should be hidden

newTable()[source]#

Create a new object list widget.

refresh()[source]#

Reload all of the section data.

removeAllTraceTags(obj_names: list)[source]#

Remove all tags from all trace on a selected object.

Params:

obj_names (list): a list of object names

toggleCuration()[source]#

Quick shortcut to toggle curation on/off for the tables.

updateObjects(obj_names: list)[source]#

Update the objects each table.

Params:

obj_names (list): the list objects to update

updateSection(section: Section)[source]#

Update the data and the table for a specific section.

Params:

section (Section): the section object section_num (int): the section number

updateTable(table: ObjectTableWidget)[source]#

Updates a table with the current data.

Params:

table (ObjectTableWidget): the table to update

updateTables()[source]#

Update all tables.

modules.backend.table.section module#

class SectionTableManager(series: Series, mainwindow)[source]#

Bases: object

close()[source]#

Close all tables.

deleteSections(section_numbers: list[int], log_event=True)[source]#

Delete a set of sections.

Params:

section_numbers (list): the list of sections to delete

editSrc(snum: int, new_src: str, log_event=True)[source]#

Set the image source for a single section (and possible for all sections).

Params:

snum (int): the number of the section to modify (none if edit all sections) new_src (str): the new image source for the section edit_all (bool): True if ALL section sources should be modified

editThickness(section_numbers: list[int], thickness: float, log_event=True)[source]#

Set the section thickness for a set of sections.

Params:

section_numbers (list): the list of section numbers to modify thickness (float): the new thickness to set for the sections

findSection(section_number: int)[source]#

Focus the view on a specific section.

Params:

section_number (int): the section the focus on

insertSection(index: int, src: str, mag: float, thickness: float)[source]#

Create a new section.

Params:

index (int): the index of the new section src (str): the path to the image for the new section mag (float): the mag of the new section thickness (float): the thickness of the new section

lockSections(section_numbers: list[int], lock: bool, log_event=True)[source]#

Lock or unlock a set of sections.

Params:

section_numbers (list): the list of section numbers to modify lock (bool): True if sections should be locked

matchBC(section_numbers: list[int])[source]#

Match the brightness and contrast of a set of sections to the current section.

Params:

section_numbers (list): the sections to modify

newTable()[source]#

Create a new trace list.

refresh()[source]#

Refresh the section data.

reorderSections()[source]#

Reorder the sections in the series.

setBC(section_numbers: list[int], b: int, c: int, log_event=True)[source]#

Set the brightness and contrast for a set of sections.

Params:

section_numbers (list): the list of section numbers to set b (int): the brightness to set c (int): the contrast to set

updateSection(snum)[source]#

Update the data for a section.

Params:

section (Section): the section number with data to update

updateSections(section_numbers: list)[source]#

Update the tables for a set of sections.

updateTables()[source]#

Updates a table with the current data.

Params:

table (ObjectTableWidget): the table to update

modules.backend.table.trace module#

class TraceTableManager(series: Series, section: Section, mainwindow)[source]#

Bases: object

close()[source]#

Close all tables.

deleteTraces(traces: list)[source]#

Delete a set of traces.

Params:

traces (list): the trace to delete

editRadius(traces: list, new_rad: float)[source]#

Edit the radius of a set of traces

Params:

traces (list): the list of traces to modify new_rad (float): the new radius for the traces

editShape(traces: list, new_shape: float)[source]#

Edit the shape of a set of traces

Params:

traces (list): the list of traces to modify new_rad (float): the new shape for the traces

editTraces(traces: list, name: str, color: tuple, tags: set, mode: tuple)[source]#

Edit a set of traces.

Params:

traces (list): the list of traces to modify name (str): the new trace name color (tuple): the new trace color tags (set): the new trace tags mode (tuple): the fill mode for the traces

findTrace(item)[source]#

Find an object in the series.

Params:

item (tuple): the iname, index of the desired trace

getTraces(items: list) → list[source]#

Get the trace objects for a list of table items.

Params:

items (list): the list of trace table items (name, index)

Returns:

traces (list): the list of actual trace objects

hideTraces(traces, hide=True)[source]#

Hide/unhide a set of traces.

Params:

traces (list): the list of traces to hide/unhide hide (bool): True if traces should be hidden

loadSection(section: Section = None)[source]#

Load all of the data for each object in the series.

Params:

section (Section): the section to load data for

newTable()[source]#

Create a new trace list.

update()[source]#

Update the table for a section.

updateTable(table: TraceTableWidget)[source]#

Updates a table with the current data.

Params:

table (ObjectTableWidget): the table to update

modules.backend.table.ztrace module#

class ZtraceTableManager(series: Series, mainwindow)[source]#

Bases: object

close()[source]#

Close all the tables.

delete(names: list, log_event=True)[source]#

Delete a set of ztraces.

Params:

names (list): the list of ztraces to delete

editAttributes(name: str, new_name: str, new_color: tuple, log_event=True)[source]#

Edit the name of a ztrace.

Params:

name (str): the name of the ztrace to change new_name (str): the new name for the trace new_color (tuple): the new color for the trace

newTable()[source]#

Create a new ztrace list.

refresh()[source]#

Refresh the series data.

smooth(names: list, smooth: int, newztrace: bool, log_event=True)[source]#

Smooth a set of ztraces.

Params:

names (list): the names of the ztraces to smooth smooth (int): the smoothing factor newztrace (bool): False if ztrace should be overwritten

update(clear_tracking=False)[source]#

Update the data for a set of ztraces.

updateTable(table: ZtraceTableWidget)[source]#

Update a table’s data.

Params:

table: the table to update

updateTables()[source]#

Update all the ztrace tables.
